Title: Artemis crew reemerge from Moon communication blackout
Description: The four astronauts carrying out NASA's first lunar flyby in more than half-a-century have renewed communications and were sending back detailed observations of the Moon after traveling further from Earth than any human before.

Description: Will Trump force Iran to capitulate, or will he blink first as the deadline on his latest ultimatum approaches? Read more at straitstimes.com.

Title: Trump threatens to jail journalist who broke story of US rescue mission in Iran
Description: US President Donald Trump is threatening to jail the journalist who broke the story about the rescue of a downed US airman in Iran, as more details about the daring recovery mission are made public.

Title: Tragedy revisited
Description: A ceremony marking the one-year anniversary of the Mandalay earthquake that struck on March 28, 2025, was held in Myanmar's capital Nay Pyi Taw, according to state-owned Myanmar Radio and Television.

Title: Artemis II live: Watch as Artemis astronauts travel further from Earth than any humans before
Description: The astronauts lost connection with Nasa for 40 minutes as they passed behind the Moon and will soon witness a total solar eclipse.

Title: Cyclist rescued by Victoria Police Air Wing, after trying to ride across the Snowy River at Suggan Buggan

Title: US weapons or China’s friendship? Trump’s Iran war volatility reignites debate for Taiwan
Description: Over Taiwan’s Qingming holiday weekend, as families cleaned ancestral graves and crowded around dinner tables, a familiar debate has resurfaced: should this island democracy rely more heavily on the United States for its security or try to reduce tensions by engaging with China?

Title: Explosion & fire near Panama Canal entrance sparks scrutiny. Shipping routes stay on edge
Description:
The incident is not yet a confirmed macro market mover, but its location gives it outsized relevance.
With Hormuz risk already pushing closer attention onto alternative shipping routes, any threat to Panama Canal access or nearby fuel logistics would amplify cross-market sensitivity in oil, freight and broader risk sentiment.
